0.q: overexpression of HuERF1 in Arabidopsis could promote the expression of ROS scavenging-related genes and then possibly enhance Arabidopsis tolerance to salt stress.

1.q: transgenic lines...accumulated less reactive oxygen species than WT plants, and had higher activities of antioxidant enzymes under NaCl stress (i.e., 300 mM).

2.q: Betaine aldehyde dehydrogenase (BADH) is a key enzyme related to the biosynthetic pathway of GB because it oversees the second step in the GB biosynthetic pathway.
